articles.title: Late Cleveland turnover, improbable 3-pointer send Raptors past Cavs 112-110 in overtime to force Game 7 - Cleveland.com
articles.description: The Cavs were outlasted by the Raptors, 112-110, in overtime of Game 6 at Scotiabank Arena. The best-of-seven series is tied at 3-3, with the finale Sunday in Cleveland.

articles.title: Sabres advance to 2nd round of Stanley Cup Playoffs - NHL.com
articles.description: A limited number of Round 2 tickets will go on sale to the general public on Saturday, May 2 at 3 p.m.

articles.title: World Series champ reveals he was behind viral ‘s–ting your pants’ insult after Alex Cora’s Red Sox firing - New York Post

articles.title: Pistons fight back from 24 down, force Game 7 vs. Magic with epic comeback - MLive.com
articles.description: An all-time defensive showing in the second half opened the door for the Pistons to survive another elimination game.

articles.title: Big Ten distributes $1.37B in revenue for 2024-25 fiscal year - ESPN
articles.description: The Big Ten Conference distributed a record $1.37 billion to its 18 members in the 2024-25 fiscal year, an increase of nearly $500 million.

articles.title: Looking back at the Mariners’ franchise-altering trade for Randy Johnson - The Seattle Times
articles.description: When Johnson was traded to the Mariners in 1989, few could have imagined it would end up being a move worth celebrating, this weekend and beyond.

articles.title: Premier League relegation battle: Leeds beat Burnley to heap pressure on others - BBC
articles.description: No club has ever been relegated with 43 points at the end of a Premier League season - so have Leeds already done enough to secure survival?

articles.title: Pete Alonso didn't have final talk with Mets leadership in Dec. - ESPN
articles.description: Pete Alonso said Friday that he didn't have a final conversation with Mets owner Steve Cohen or president of baseball operations David Stearns before signing with the Orioles.

articles.title: ‘Yes’: Malkin Firmly Says He Will Play for Another Team If Penguins Decline - Pittsburgh Hockey Now
articles.description: Pittsburgh Penguins franchise icon Evgeni Malkin said Friday he would be open to playing for another NHL team if he is not re-signed.

articles.title: After NASCAR’s Greg Biffle and family died, police now think ‘friends’ stole from them - AP News
articles.description: New search warrants reveal a potential plot involving "friends" of former NASCAR driver Greg Biffle and his wife, Cristina. The warrant's affidavits say that friends allegedly conspired to steal from the couple after they died in a plane crash on December 18.…

articles.description: Having now reported to rookie minicamp to begin their NFL career, Caleb Downs and the 2026 rookie class have been assigned jersey numbers by the Cowboys.
